scripts.quality:gate: npm run -w @gp/api test && npm run -w @gp/api test:e2e && npm run -w @gp/api build && npm run -w @gp/web build
scripts.dev:restart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=3000,3001; $procIds=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in $ports } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach($procId in $procIds){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if(Test-Path 'apps/web/.next'){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'apps/web/.next' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe' -ArgumentList '/c','cd /d C:\Users\paulo\OneDrive\Documentos\Gestao_Pecuaria && npm run -w @gp/api start:dev' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe' -ArgumentList '/c','cd /d C:\Users\paulo\OneDrive\Documentos\Gestao_Pecuaria && npm run -w @gp/web dev' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in $ports } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess"
